description_long: This is a rectangular wooden table with a smooth, flat top and four tapered legs positioned at each corner. The tabletop features a natural wood grain pattern, giving it a warm and classic appearance. The legs are slightly angled outward, providing stability and a touch of mid-century modern style. The table is constructed entirely from wood, with no visible hardware, drawers, or additional components. Its design is minimalist, with clean lines and no decorative embellishments. The finish appears to be matte or lightly polished, enhancing the natural beauty of the wood.
description: A rectangular wooden table with a smooth, natural wood grain top and four tapered legs, featuring a minimalist and classic design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the tabletop and all four tapered legs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the tabletop and the slim profile of the legs.
description_view_2: Rear view, visually identical to the front, displaying the tabletop and all four legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the tabletop's length and leg profile.
